productDisplayName: Rockport Men SC Blucher Lace up Brown Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the man who never compromises on style and comfort, this pair of Blucher Lace UP leather shoes from rockport makes for a great addition to your casual wardrobe. With a waterproof upper and exemplary cushioning, this shoe is all set to be your true companion this winter.UpperLeather upper engineered with Hydro Shield technology for waterproofingHas a TPR toe foxing for durabilityLacing system for a snug, customised FitMesh around the collar for breathable comfortCushioned collar with adiPRENE inserts in the footbed for a custom fit and impact protectionRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced durability, with circular and herringbone styled lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for ease of movementShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a waterproofing solution when neededDo not store in direct sunlight
